# Kimi Code Platform — gald3r Configuration Guide

**Platform**: Kimi Code CLI (Moonshot AI) — `MoonshotAI/kimi-code`, renamed from `kimi-cli` (2026-07-03 rebrand)
**Config Folder**: `.kimi-code/` (current convention; this shipped overlay still uses the legacy `.kimi/` directory name — see note below)
**gald3r Version**: 1.0.0
**Official Docs**: https://www.kimi.com/code/docs/en (mirror: https://moonshotai.github.io/kimi-code/en/)
**Instruction File**: root `AGENTS.md` (generated by `/init`; injected via `KIMI_AGENTS_MD`). Kimi does NOT read `CLAUDE.md`. Unchanged by the rebrand.
**Authoritative skill**: `g-skl-platform-kimi` (if present)
**Capability detail**: see `../PLATFORM_SPEC.md` (rebrand re-verified 2026-07-03)

> **Legacy directory name note:** this overlay ships its native-skill copy under `.kimi/` for
> historical reasons. The CLI's current documented convention is **`.kimi-code/`**
> (`~/.kimi-code/` user-level, `KIMI_CODE_HOME`-overridable). When installing into a project,
> prefer creating `.kimi-code/skills/` going forward; `.agents/skills/` remains the documented
> cross-tool discovery path. A full overlay-directory rename is tracked as a follow-up (out of
> scope for this doc-scan refresh — see PLATFORM_SPEC.md rebrand_note).

---

## Folder Layout (current CLI convention)

```
<project-root>/
├── AGENTS.md                            # instruction file (injected via KIMI_AGENTS_MD)
├── .kimi-code/
│   ├── local.toml                       # project-local settings (gitignored)
│   └── skills/   <name>/SKILL.md        # Agent Skills (YAML frontmatter + Markdown body)
└── .agents/skills/ <name>/SKILL.md      # ALSO discovered by Kimi (cross-tool compatible)

$KIMI_CODE_HOME/            (default ~/.kimi-code/)
├── config.toml                          # hooks ([[hooks]]) + settings (TOML, user-level)
├── skills/   <name>/SKILL.md            # user-level skills
└── agents/   <name>.yaml                # built-in / custom agent specs
```

---

## Cross-Tool Reuse (rebrand-updated — important)

Current docs list Agent Skill discovery as **`.agents/skills/`** (project + user), plus the
native `.kimi-code/skills/` (project) / `$KIMI_CODE_HOME/skills/` (user) tiers.
**`.claude/skills/` and `.codex/skills/` are no longer documented as discovery paths** — do not
assume gald3r's `.claude/skills/` tree loads on Kimi without re-verifying. The `.kimi/skills/`
copy shipped in this overlay is retained as the explicit native-form reference; treat it as
equivalent to `.kimi-code/skills/` when installing.

## gald3r Naming Conventions

| Component | Surface |
|-----------|---------|
| Skills | `.kimi-code/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (also `.agents/skills/`) |
| Agents | `$KIMI_CODE_HOME/agents/<name>.yaml` (default `~/.kimi-code/agents/`, user-level YAML specs) |
| Commands | expressed through Skills / Plugins (no dedicated standalone slash-command file) |
| Hooks | `$KIMI_CODE_HOME/config.toml` (default `~/.kimi-code/config.toml`, `[[hooks]]`) |
| MCP | `kimi mcp` / `/mcp-config` (this scaffold ships `.kimi/.mcp.json` as reference) |

## Capability Note

Kimi natively supports Agent Skills, rules/memory, subagents, lifecycle hooks, MCP, and
user-defined commands (via Skills + Plugins). The instruction file gald3r owns is `AGENTS.md`
(not `CLAUDE.md`). The config schema (`config.toml`) lives under `$KIMI_CODE_HOME` (default
`~/.kimi-code/`, renamed from `~/.kimi/` in the 2026-07-03 rebrand); Custom Plugins remain Beta.
